name: Custom Care & Transport Svc
recent_news: No public news found; appears to be a very small WI non-emergency medical/special-needs transport with ~6 employees and ~$241K revenue. Not identifiable as a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Sub-scale micro-operator (likely NEMT, not school bus). Not a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Ohana Wheelchair Transport
recent_news: Listed on Manta/Chamber of Commerce as a Port Washington, WI wheelchair transport. Related/affiliated entity 'Ohana Ambulance and EMS LLC' also operates in same zip. No M&A or school-district contracts identified.
fit_notes: NEMT/wheelchair van micro-operator, not a school-bus contractor. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in strategy.

name: Adaptive Enterprise
recent_news: Kentucky-incorporated 2003; per Manta/Yellowpages it transports clients to/from adult day facilities. No school-district contracts or M&A activity found.
fit_notes: Adult-day-program NEMT, not a school-bus operator. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: Als Limousine
recent_news: No public school-transport or M&A signal. Appears to be a small Farmington, UT limousine/livery operator; not identified as a student-transport contractor.
fit_notes: Limousine micro-operator, not a school-bus/SPED operator. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Manchester Limousine Svc
recent_news: Leonard Dubrow listed as owner of 'Manchester Mini Van Taxi Service' at same Manchester Center, VT address. Operates as a taxi/limo, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Taxi/limo micro-operator; not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.
